MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2-DEFENDANT CAMERON MILLER'S Motion To Set Aside Default Motion To Set Aside Default Declaration Of Cameron Miller.

Defendant Cameron Miller's motion to set aside default and default judgment per CCP 473(b). Granted per agreement of the parties. Ms. Macomber to submit a proposed form of order.
